name: Style Learning
description: Style miner workflow: scan new articles, extract patterns, merge into fingerprint, present diff report.

nodes.prompt: Scan past-articles/ for files not yet in profile.analyzedArticles.
Spawn style-miner agent. Extract sentence patterns, vocabulary, transitions, citation style, and representative excerpts from each new article.
Merge new patterns with existing styleFingerprint. Generate diff report.
Present diff report to researcher. Confirm or discard updates.
Save updated fingerprint to profile.json. Update analyzedArticles list.
